seoTitle: Tayene vs Tea Tree — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Tayene and Tea Tree. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Tayene vs Tea Tree: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Tayene and Tea Tree.
heading: Tayene vs Tea Tree — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tayene, Tasmania and Tea Tree, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tea Tree has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Tayene (46/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Tayene or Tea Tree safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tayene has a flood risk score of 48/100, while Tea Tree scores 39/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tayene scores 55/100 for bushfire risk. Tea Tree scores 36/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tayene or Tea Tree?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tea Tree has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.33% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
